privileged_info_for_vlm: The task asks to update control 'A.11.2.8 Clear Desk and Clear Screen'. Note that in the actual ISO 27001 standard, A.11.2.8 is 'Unattended User Equipment' and A.11.2.9 is 'Clear Desk and Clear Screen'. The agent should target the control labeled A.11.2.8 in the system regardless of the exact title match. The expected status is 'Compliant' (or equivalent system codes like 'Pass' or 'Yes'). The required evidence strings to look for in the Findings/Description are 'Workstation Security_v2' and '900s'. The expected Next Review Date is 2026-06-30. The data is hosted in an Eramba GRC system.
